productDisplayName: Peter England Men Stripes Blue Shirt
description: Composition Blue and white striped shirt, made of a cotton blend fabric, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with a buttoned front placket, patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Fitting Nuvo Wash care Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron Break the monotony and add a dose of energy with a splash of colour in this striped formal shirt from peter england's Zest collection. Crafted from a cotton blend fabric and stitched to perfection, this shirt offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with crisp formals, a blazer, classy accessories and rich leather formal shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
